name: Easy Truffles
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sweet ground chocolate or unsweet cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips in a large microwaveable bowl using the microwave on High setting, stirring thoroughly every 30 seconds. Set aside.
2. Beat the fat-free cream cheese with an electric mixer on Medium until smooth. Gradually add the sugar, beating until well blended. Dissolve the instant coffee in the non-fat milk and stir it into the cream cheese mixture. Add the vanilla and melted chocolate.
3. Refrigerate for about 15 minutes. Shape into 1-inch balls. Sift the sweet ground chocolate over the truffle balls.
4. Store in the refrigerator. Yield: 48 truffles.
